title: Extract shared destination-path constants from install/skills-and-hooks.ts
description: Extract hard-coded destination paths (per-client skill SKILL.md destinations, per-client hook .cjs script destinations, deep-merge target config paths, POINTER_TARGETS) into exported const tables. Refactor existing install helpers (installFabricArchiveSkill / installFabricReviewSkill / installFabricImportSkill / installArchiveHintHook / installKnowledgeHintBroadHook / installKnowledgeHintNarrowHook / mergeClaudeCodeHookConfig / mergeCodexHookConfig / mergeCursorHookConfig / addArchiveSkillPointer) to consume the new constants. ZERO behavior change: all existing install integration tests pass byte-identically. This is the foundation TASK-002 and TASK-003 depend on — single source of truth for the install ⇄ uninstall destination contract.

files.change: Export const SKILL_DESTINATIONS = { fabricArchive: ['.claude/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md','.codex/skills/fabric-archive/SKILL.md'], fabricReview: [...], fabricImport: [...] }; export const HOOK_SCRIPT_DESTINATIONS = { fabricHint: ['.claude/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs','.codex/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs','.cursor/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs'], knowledgeHintBroad: [...], knowledgeHintNarrow: [...] }; export const HOOK_CONFIG_TARGETS = { claudeCode: '.claude/settings.json', codex: '.codex/hooks.json', cursor: '.cursor/hooks.json' }; export const HOOK_CONFIG_ARRAY_PATHS = { claudeCode: ['hooks.Stop','hooks.SessionStart','hooks.PreToolUse'], codex: ['events.Stop','events.SessionStart','events.PreToolUse'], cursor: ['events.Stop','events.SessionStart','events.PreToolUse'] }; export const FABRIC_HOOK_COMMAND_PATHS = { claudeCode: { fabricHint: '.claude/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs', knowledgeHintBroad: '.claude/hooks/knowledge-hint-broad.cjs', knowledgeHintNarrow: '.claude/hooks/knowledge-hint-narrow.cjs' }, codex: {...}, cursor: {...} }. POINTER_TARGETS already exists at L79 — re-export it. POINTER_LINE / REVIEW_POINTER_LINE / IMPORT_POINTER_LINE already exist at L72-L77 — re-export them. Refactor every install*Skill / install*HintHook / mergeXHookConfig / addArchiveSkillPointer body to read from these constants instead of inlining literal paths.

implementation: Read packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts in full; identify every literal path string in the 9 install helpers + addArchiveSkillPointer.

Define the 5 exported const tables (SKILL_DESTINATIONS, HOOK_SCRIPT_DESTINATIONS, HOOK_CONFIG_TARGETS, HOOK_CONFIG_ARRAY_PATHS, FABRIC_HOOK_COMMAND_PATHS) at module top; ensure POINTER_TARGETS / POINTER_LINE / REVIEW_POINTER_LINE / IMPORT_POINTER_LINE are exported (add `export` if missing).
Refactor each install helper to read its destinations from the new constants — e.g., installFabricArchiveSkill iterates over SKILL_DESTINATIONS.fabricArchive instead of inlining the 2 paths.
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test` and confirm all existing init-related tests pass with zero snapshot drift. If a snapshot changes, the refactor altered behavior — revert and retry.
Add JSDoc on each exported const explaining its role as the single source of truth for both install and uninstall flows.

reference.pattern: Extract-then-consume refactor: move literals into named exports, replace inline usage with named reference; verify with existing tests as the safety net.
reference.examples: POINTER_TARGETS / POINTER_LINE pattern already in skills-and-hooks.ts:L72-L79 — extend the same idiom to the other destination tables.

criteria: packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts exports exactly 5 new const tables (SKILL_DESTINATIONS, HOOK_SCRIPT_DESTINATIONS, HOOK_CONFIG_TARGETS, HOOK_CONFIG_ARRAY_PATHS, FABRIC_HOOK_COMMAND_PATHS) plus the 4 existing pointer constants are exported (POINTER_TARGETS, POINTER_LINE, REVIEW_POINTER_LINE, IMPORT_POINTER_LINE).

Every literal path string ('.claude/skills/...', '.codex/hooks/...', '.cursor/hooks.json', etc.) inside the 10 helper bodies (3 install*Skill, 3 install*HintHook, 3 mergeXHookConfig, 1 addArchiveSkillPointer) is replaced by a const reference — verified via grep showing zero `'\.\(claude\|codex\|cursor\)/'` string literals remain inside helper function bodies.

`pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test` exit code is 0 and `packages/cli/__tests__/__snapshots__/cli-surface.test.ts.snap` + `packages/cli/__tests__/__snapshots__/i18n.test.ts.snap` are byte-identical to the pre-refactor commit (verified via `git diff --stat` showing zero changes in __snapshots__/).

rationale.chosen_approach: Extract destination tables as exported consts in the existing install module (Option A from clarification #2), letting both install (refactored, behavior-preserving) and uninstall (new) consume one source of truth.
alternatives_considered: Add runtime install-manifest.json artifact (Option B from clarification #2) — rejected: rc.7/8 users would have no manifest; need a fallback either way
Walk templates/ at runtime (Option C) — rejected: depends on templates surviving bundling, brittle
Hybrid: constants now + manifest later (Option D) — accepted as a future evolution path; this task implements the constants foundation
decision_factors: Single source of truth between install and uninstall
Zero migration cost for existing users
Test-suite safety net catches behavior drift
rationale.tradeoffs: When templates evolve (new skill, new hook), destination consts must be updated alongside the install helper — but the consts are co-located with the helpers, so the diff is local.

manual_checks: Open packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts; verify 5 new exports + no inline literal paths in helpers
success_metrics: All existing init-suite tests pass: 0 failures
Zero snapshot drift in cli-surface.test.ts.snap and i18n.test.ts.snap
